ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Adjustment Deletion Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This field distinguishes original from adjusted or deleted PDE records so CMS can adjust claims and make accurate payment for revised PDE records.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Brand Generic Indicator
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: Plan reported value indicating whether the plan adjudicated the claim as a brand or generic drug.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Related Diagnosis Group Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The diagnostic related group to which a hospital claim belongs for prospective payment purposes.
additional: eob.supportingInfo[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Claim Diagnosis Related Group Code (or MS-DRG Code)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Claim Frequency Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The third digit of the type of bill (TOB3) submitted on an institutional claim record to indicate the sequence of a claim in the beneficiary's current episode of care

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Claim LUPA Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code used to identify those Home Health PPS claims that have 4 visits or less in a 60-day episode.
additional: eob.supportingInfo[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Claim HHA Low Utilization Payment Adjustment (LUPA) Indicator Code')

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Claim Referral Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code used to identify the means by which the beneficiary was referred for Home Health services.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Admission Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code indicating the type and priority of an inpatient admission associated with the service on an intermediary submitted claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: MCO Paid Switch
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: A switch indicating whether or not a Managed Care Organization (MCO) has paid the provider for an institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Prospective Payment Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code indicating whether or not: (1) the claim is from the prospective payment system (PPS), and/or (2) the beneficiary is a deemed insured MQGE (Medicare Qualified Government Employee)

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Source Admission Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code indicating the source of the referral for the admission or visit.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Compound Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This field indicates whether or not the dispensed drug was compounded or mixed.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Catastrophic Coverage Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This variable indicates whether the PDE occurred within the catastrophic benefit phase of the Medicare Part D benefit, according to the source PDE.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Dispense as Written Product Selection Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This field indicates the prescriber's instruction regarding substitution of generic equivalents or order to dispense the specific prescribed medication.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Drug Coverage Status Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This field indicates whether or not the drug is covered by Medicare Part D.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Dispensing Status Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This field indicates how the pharmacy dispensed the complete quantity of the prescription.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Primary Payer Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code, on an institutional claim, specifying a federal non-Medicare program or other source that has primary responsibility for the payment of the Medicare beneficiary's health insurance bills.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Patient Status Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This variable is a recoded version of the discharge status code.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Non-standard Format Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This data element is used by CMS to identify PDE records that are compiled from non-standard sources.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Pricing Exception Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This variable indicates if the PDE was processed by the Part D plan using pricing rules that differ from the plan's negotiated price. Most PDEs have missing values, indicating that they were obtained from in-network pharmacies.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Patient Discharge Status Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: The code used to identify the status of the patient as of the Claim Through Date.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Patient Residence Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This variable indicates where the beneficiary lived when the prescription was filled, as reported on the PDE record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Prescription Origin Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: This variable indicates whether the prescription was transmitted as an electronic prescription, by phone, by fax, or as a written paper copy.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.name: Submission Clarification Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.code.description: For beneficiaries living in long-term care (LTC) facilities, this variable indicates how many days’ supply of the medication was dispensed by the long-term care pharmacy and provides some details about the dispensing event.

ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.name: Admitting Diagnosis Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.description: A diagnosis code on the institutional claim indicating the beneficiary's initial diagnosis at admission.
additional: eob.diagnosis[N].sequence = # selected by the code depending upon order of diagnosis

ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.name: Admitting Diagnosis Code Version
ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.description: Effective with Version ‘J,’ the code used to indicate if the diagnosis code is ICD-9/ICD-10.

ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.name: External Diagnosis First Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.diagnosis.description: The code used to identify the 1st external cause of injury, poisoning, or other adverse effect. This diagnosis E code is also stored as the 1st occurrence of the diagnosis E code trailer.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Attending Physician NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the national provider identifier (NPI) is a unique number assigned to identify the physician who has overall responsibility for the beneficiary's care and treatment.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Attending Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the unique physician identification number (UPIN) of the physician who would normally be expected to certify and recertify the medical necessity of the services rendered and/or who has primary responsibility for the beneficiary's medical care and treatment (attending physician).

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Referring Provider Id Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: The provider identification number (PIN) of the physician/supplier (assigned by the MAC) who referred the beneficiary to the physician who ordered these services.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Operating Physician NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the National Provider Identifier (NPI) number assigned to uniquely identify the physician with the primary responsibility for performing the surgical procedure(s).

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Operating Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the unique physician identification number (UPIN) of the physician who performed the principal procedure. This element is used by the provider to identify the operating physician who performed the surgical procedure.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Organization NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the organization or group practice.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Other Physician NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the National Provider Identifier (NPI) number assigned to uniquely identify the other physician associated with the institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Other Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: On an institutional claim, the unique physician identification number (UPIN) of the other physician associated with the institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Performing Physician NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) assigned to the performing provider.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Performing Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: The unique physician identification number (UPIN) of the physician who performed the service for this line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Prescriber Id
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: This variable contains the prescriber identification number as reported by the Part D sponsor on the PDE record submitted to CMS.
additional: eob.careTeam[N].provider.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Provider NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) assigned to the supplier of the Part B service/DMEPOS line item.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Rendering Physician NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: This variable is the National Provider Identifier (NPI) for the physician who rendered the services.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.name: Rendering Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.provider.description: This variable is the unique physician identification number (UPIN) for the physician who rendered the services on the revenue center record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Hospice Period Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The count of the number of hospice period trailers present for the beneficiary's record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Claim Entry Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: Carrier-generated code describing whether the Part B claim is an original debit, full credit, or replacement debit.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Claim Payment Denial Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating who receives payment or if the claim was denied.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Provider Assignement Indicator
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: Variable indicates whether or not the provider accepts assignment for the noninstitutional claim.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Carrier Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The identification number assigned by CMS to a carrier authorized to process claims from a physician or supplier.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Clinical Trial Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The number used to identify all items and line-item services provided to a beneficiary during their participation in a clinical trial.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Claim Non Payment Reason Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The reason that no Medicare payment is made for services on an institutional claim.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Claim Service Classification Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The type of service provided to the beneficiary.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Operating Disproportionate Share Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: This is one component of the total amount that is payable on prospective payment system (PPS) claims and reflects the DSH (disproportionate share hospital) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: FI Claim Action Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The type of action requested by the intermediary to be taken on an institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: FI Claim Process Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The date the fiscal intermediary completes processing and releases the institutional claim to the CMS common working file (CWF; stored in the NCH).

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: FI Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: The identification number assigned by CMS to a fiscal intermediary (FI) authorized to process institutional claim records.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Operating Indirect Medical Education Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: This is one component of the total amount that is payable on PPS claims, and reflects the IME (indirect medical education) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Near Line Record Identification Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: A code defining the type of claim record being processed.
additional: eob.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: FI Document Claim Control Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: This field is an identification value for institutional claims processed by the fiscal intermediary standard system (FISS). It provides a reference number for the control and monitoring of specific claims, and to differentiate between claims for the beneficiary. This is a unique field created by FISS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Carrier Clam Control Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: This field is an identification number for professional claims processed by the multi-carrier system (MCS). This field contains a numeric value that identifies a claim throughout the processing cycle and allows for a linkage between the claim and the beneficiary for whom it was submitted. This should be handled as a character field due to leading ‘0’s. This is a unique field created by MCS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.name: Claim Uncompensated Care Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.extension.description: This field identifies the payment for disproportionate share hospitals (DSH). It represents the uncompensated care amount of the payment

ExplanationOfBenefit.patient.name: Beneficiary Id
ExplanationOfBenefit.patient.description: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid and uses that number to identify an individual’s records in all CCW data files. This number does not change during a beneficiary’s lifetime, and CCW uses each number only once. The BENE_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any other identification system or data source.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Lifetime Reserved Days Used Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The number of lifetime reserve days that the beneficiary has elected to use during the period covered by the institutional claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].code = 'Beneficiary Medicare Lifetime Reserve Days (LRD) Used Count'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Total Coinsurance Days Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The count of the total number of coinsurance days involved with the beneficiary's stay in a facility.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Part B Deductible Applied Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of the cash deductible as submitted on the claim. This variable is the beneficiary’s liability under the annual Part B deductible for all line items on the claim; it is the sum of all line-level deductible amounts.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'Carrier Claim Cash Deductible Applied Amount (sum of all line-level deductible amounts)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Non Utilization Day Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: On an institutional claim, the number of days of care that are not chargeable to Medicare facility utilization.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Outpatient Beneficiary Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount paid, from the Medicare trust fund, to the beneficiary for the services reported on the outpatient claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Outpatient Provider Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount paid, from the Medicare trust fund, to the provider for the services reported on the outpatient claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Pass Through Per Diem Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: Medicare establishes a daily payment amount to reimburse IPPS hospitals for certain “pass-through” expenses, such as capital-related costs, direct medical education costs, kidney acquisition costs for hospitals that are renal transplant centers, and bad debts. This variable is the daily payment rate for pass-through expenses.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital DRG Weight Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The number used to determine a transfer adjusted case mix index for capital, under the prospective payment system (PPS). The number is determined by multiplying the Diagnosis Related Group Code (DRG) weight times the discharge fraction.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital Disproportionate Share Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of disproportionate share (rate reflecting indigent population served) portion of the PPS payment for capital.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital Exception Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The capital PPS amount of exception payments provided for hospitals with inordinately high levels of capital obligations. Exception payments expire at the end of the 10-year transition period.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital FSP Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of the federal specific portion of the PPS payment for capital.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'Claim PPS Capital Federal Specific Portion (FSP) Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital IME Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of the indirect medical education (IME) (reimbursable amount for teaching hospitals only; an added amount passed by Congress to augment normal prospective payment system [PPS] payments for teaching hospitals to compensate them for higher patient costs resulting from medical education programs for interns and residents) portion of the PPS payment for capital.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'Claim PPS Capital Indirect Medical Education (IME) Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Capital Outlier Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of the outlier portion of the PPS payment for capital.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim PPS Old Capital Hold Harmless Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: This amount is the hold harmless amount payable for old capital as computed by PRICER for providers with a payment code equal to 'A'.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'Claim PPS Old Capital Hold Harmless Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Claim Total PPS Capital Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total amount that is payable for capital for the prospective payment system (PPS) claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Utilization Day Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: On an institutional claim, the number of covered days of care that are chargeable to Medicare facility utilization that includes full days, coinsurance days, and lifetime reserve days. It excludes any days classified as non-covered, leave of absence days, and the day of discharge or death.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Blood Deductible Liability Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of money for which the intermediary determined the beneficiary is liable for the blood deductible.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Deductible Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of the deductible the beneficiary paid for inpatient services, as originally submitted on the institutional claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Beneficiary Inpatient (or other Part A) Deductible Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Part A Coinsurance Liability Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of money for which the intermediary has determined that the beneficiary is liable for Part A coinsurance on the institutional claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Beneficiary Part A Coinsurance Liability Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Part B Coinsurance Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of money for which the intermediary has determined that the beneficiary is liable for Part B coinsurance on the institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Part B Deductible Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of money for which the intermediary or carrier has determined that the beneficiary is liable for the Part B cash deductible on the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Carrier Allowed Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total allowed charges on the claim (the sum of line item allowed charges).
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Carrier Claim Allowed Charge Amount (sum of all line-level allowed charges)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Submitted Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total submitted charges on the claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Carrier Claim Submitted Charge Amount (sum of all line-level submitted charges)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Beneficiary Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total payments made to the beneficiary for this claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Provider Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total payments made to the provider for this claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: DRG Outlier Approved Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: On an institutional claim, the additional payment amount approved by the Quality Improvement Organization due to an outlier situation for a beneficiary's stay under the prospective payment system (PPS), which has been classified into a specific diagnosis related group (DRG).

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Inpatient Noncovered Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The non-covered charges for all accommodations and services, reported on an inpatient claim (used for internal NCHMQA editing purposes).
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Inpatient(or other Part A) Non-covered Charge Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Inpatient Total Deduction Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The total of all Part A and blood deductibles and coinsurance amounts on the claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Inpatient (or other Part A) Total Deductible/Coinsurance Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Primary Payer Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: The amount of a payment made on behalf of a Medicare beneficiary by a primary payer other than Medicare, that the provider is applying to covered Medicare charges on a non-institutional claim.
additional: eob.benefitBalance[N].financial[N].type.coding[N].display = 'NCH Primary Payer (if not Medicare) Claim Paid Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.name: Professional Component Charge
ExplanationOfBenefit.benefitBalance.fina.description: This field is the amount of physician and other professional charges covered under Medicare Part B.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: BETOS Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The Berenson-Eggers type of service (BETOS) for the procedure code based on generally agreed upon clinically meaningful groupings of procedures and services.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Anesthesia Unit Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The base number of units assigned to the line item anesthesia procedure on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Carrier MTUS Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: Code indicating the units associated with services needing unit reporting on the line item for the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Carrier MTUS Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The count of the total units associated with services needing unit reporting such as transportation, miles, anesthesia time units, number of services, volume of oxygen or blood units.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: DMERC MTUS Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: Code indicating the units associated with services needing unit reporting on the line item for the DMERC service.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: DMERC MTUS Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The count of the total units associated with services needing unit reporting such as number of supplies, volume of oxygen or nutritional units.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Pricing State Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The 2-digit SSA state code where the durable medical equipment (DME) supplier was located; used by the Medicare Administrative Contractor (MAC) for pricing the service.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Screen Savings Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The amount of savings attributable to the coverage screen for this DMERC line item.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Line Primary Payer Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The code specifying a federal non-Medicare program or other source that has primary responsibility for the payment of the Medicare beneficiary's medical bills relating to the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Processing Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating to whom payment was made or if the claim was denied.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Service Deductible Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: Switch indicating whether or not the line-item service on the non-institutional claim is subject to a deductible.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Provider Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: This variable is the provider identification number.  OR The billing number assigned to the supplier of the Part B service/DMEPOS by the National Supplier Clearinghouse, as reported on the line item for the DMERC claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.name: Provider Tax Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.extension.description: The federal taxpayer identification number (TIN) that identifies the physician/practice/supplier to whom payment is made for the line-item service.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: HCPCS Year Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: The Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) uses this terminal digit to specify the year that the HCPCS code was from for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: HCPCS Initial Modifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: A first modifier to the Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) procedure code to enable a more specific procedure identification for the revenue center or line-item service for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: HCPCS Second Modifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: A second modifier to the Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) procedure code to make it more specific than the first modifier code to identify the revenue center or line-item service for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: HCPCS Third Modifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: A third modifier to the Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) procedure code to make it more specific than the first or second modifier codes to identify the revenue center or line-item services for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: HCPCS Fourth Modifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: A fourth modifier to the Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) procedure code to make it more specific than the first, second, or third modifier codes identify the revenue center or line-item services for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.name: Revenue Center NDC Quantity Qualifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.modifier.description: The code used to indicate the unit of measurement for the drug that was administered.

ExplanationOfBenefit.total.amount.name: Carrier Primary Payer Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.total.amount.description: The amount of a payment made on behalf of a Medicare beneficiary by a primary payer other than Medicare, that the provider is applying to covered Medicare charges on a non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.total.amount.name: Total Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.total.amount.description: The total charges for all services included on the institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: CLIA Lab Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: The identification number assigned to the clinical laboratory providing services for the line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: Line Pricing Locality Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: Code denoting the carrier-specific locality used for pricing the service for this line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: Place Of Service Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: The code indicating the place of service, as defined in the Medicare Carrier Manual, for this line item on the non-institutional claim.

    "system": "https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/line_place_of_srvc_cd",

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: Provider State Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: The two-digit numeric social security administration (SSA) state code where provider or facility is located.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: Provider State Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: The two-digit numeric social security administration (SSA) state code where provider or facility is located.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].name: Provider Zip Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.location[x].description: The ZIP code of the physician/supplier who performed the Part B service for this line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.extension.name: Provider Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.extension.description: Code identifying the type of provider furnishing the service for this line item on the carrier claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.extension.name: Provider Participating Indicator Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.careTeam.extension.description: Code indicating whether or not a provider is participating (accepting assignment) for this line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.name: Reduced Payment Physician Assistant Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.description: The code on the carrier (non-DMERC) line item that identifies the line items that have been paid a reduced fee schedule amount (65%, 75% or 85%) because a physician's assistant performed the service.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.name: Revenue Center 1st ANSI Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.description: The first code used to identify the detailed reason an adjustment was made (e.g., reason for denial or reducing payment).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.name: Revenue Center 2nd ANSI Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.description: The second code used to identify the detailed reason an adjustment was made (e.g., reason for denial or reducing payment).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.name: Revenue Center 3rd ANSI Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.description: The third code used to identify the detailed reason an adjustment was made (e.g., reason for denial or reducing payment).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.name: Revenue Center 4th ANSI Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.r.description: The fourth code used to identify the detailed reason an adjustment was made (e.g., reason for denial or reducing payment).

ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.name: Claim Query Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.description: Code indicating the type of claim record being processed with respect to payment (debit/credit indicator; interim/final indicator).

ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.name: Claim From Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.description: The first day on the billing statement covering services rendered to the beneficiary (a.k.a. 'Statement Covers From Date').

ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.name: Claim Through Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.billablePeriod.description: The last day on the billing statement covering services rendered to the beneficiary (a.k.a. 'Statement Covers Thru Date').

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Claim Admission Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: On an institutional claim, the date the beneficiary was admitted to the hospital, skilled nursing facility, or religious non-medical health care institution. When this variable appears in the HHA claims (Short Name = HHSTRTDT), it is the date the care began for the HHA services reported on the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Claim Hospice Start Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: On an institutional claim, the date the beneficiary was admitted to the hospice care.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Covered Care Through Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The date on a claim for which the covered level of care ended in a general hospital or the active care ended in a psychiatric/tuberculosis hospital.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Beneficiary Discharge Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: On an inpatient or Home Health claim, the date the beneficiary was discharged from the facility, or died.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Medicare Benefits Exhausted Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The last date for which the beneficiary has Medicare coverage.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Qualified Stay From Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The beginning date of the beneficiary's qualifying Medicare stay.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Qualified Stay Through Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The ending date of the beneficiary's qualifying Medicare stay.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Noncovered Stay From Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The beginning date of the beneficiary's Non-covered stay.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Noncovered Stay Through Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The ending date of the beneficiary's non-covered stay.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.name: Weekly Process Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.timi.description: The date the weekly NCH database load process cycle begins, during which the claim records are loaded into the Nearline file. This date will always be a Friday, although the claims will actually be appended to the database subsequent to the date.

ExplanationOfBenefit.disposition.name: Claim Disposition Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.disposition.description: Code indicating the disposition or outcome of the processing of the claim record. In the source CMS National Claims History (NCH), claims are transactional records, and several iterations of the claim may exist (e.g., original claim, an edited/updated version — which also cancels the original claim, etc.). The final reconciled version of the claim is contained in CCW-produced data files, unless otherwise requested. For final claims (at least those that are final at the time of the data file), t…

ExplanationOfBenefit.diagnosis.extension.description: The present on admission (POA) indicator code associated with the diagnosis E codes (principal and secondary).

ExplanationOfBenefit.facility.name: Pharmacy Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.facility.description: The type of pharmacy used. This variable indicates the type of pharmacy that dispensed the prescription, as recorded on the PDE.

ExplanationOfBenefit.facility.name: Service Provider Qualifier Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.facility.description: This variable indicates the type of pharmacy provider identifier that was used in the SRVC_PRVDR_ID field, as reported by the Part D sponsor on the PDE record submitted to CMS.
additional: eob.facility.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.name: Claim Total Visit Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.description: The count of the number of HHA visits as derived by CMS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.name: Days Supply
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.description: This field indicates the number of days' supply of medication dispensed by the pharmacy and consists of the amount the pharmacy enters for the prescription.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.name: Fill Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.description: This field indicates the number fill of the current dispensed supply.

ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.name: Blood Pints Furnished Quantity
ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.valu.description: Number of whole pints of blood furnished to the beneficiary, as reported on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.name: Claim ID
ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.description: This is the unique identification number for the claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.name: Event Id
ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.description: Identifies a unique Part D event for a beneficiary.

ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.name: Prescription Reference Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.identifier.description: This field contains the prescription reference number assigned by the pharmacy at the time the prescription is filled.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.sequence.name: Claim Line Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.sequence.description: This variable identifies an individual line number on a claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.sequence.name: Line Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.sequence.description: This variable identifies an individual line number on a claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Covered D Plan Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This is the net amount that the Part D plan paid for a PDE that was covered by the Medicare Part D benefit.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Amount paid by Part D plan for the PDE (drug is covered by Part D)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Gross Drug Cost Above Out Of Pocket Threshold
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the portion of the gross drug cost for the prescription drug fill that was covered by Part D’s catastrophic coverage.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Gross Drug Cost Above Part D Out-of-Pocket Threshold (GDCA)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Gross Drug Cost Below Out Of Pocket Threshold
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the portion of the gross drug cost for the prescription drug fill that was not covered by Part D’s catastrophic coverage.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Gross Drug Cost Below Part D Out-of-Pocket Threshold (GDCB)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Low Income Cost Sharing Subsidy Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This is the amount of cost sharing for the drug that was paid by the Part D low-income subsidy (LICS). This field contains plan-reported amounts per drug event; CMS uses this information to reconcile the prospective payments it makes to Part D plans for expected low-income cost sharing with the actual amounts incurred by the plans.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Amount paid for the PDE by Part D low income subsidy'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Allowed Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount of allowed charges for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Payment Amount to Beneficiary
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The payment (reimbursement) made to the beneficiary related to the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Primary Payer Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount of a payment made on behalf of a Medicare beneficiary by a primary payer other than Medicare, that the provider is applying to covered Medicare charges for to the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Line Primary Payer (if not Medicare) Paid Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Beneficiary Part B Deductible Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount of money for which the carrier has determined that the beneficiary is liable for the Part B cash deductible for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Coinsurance Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The beneficiary coinsurance liability amount for this line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Purchase Price Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount representing the lower of fee schedule for purchase of new or used DME, or actual charge. In case of rental DME, this amount represents the purchase cap; rental payments can only be made until the cap is met.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: Amount of payment made from the Medicare trust fund (after deductible and coinsurance amounts have been paid) for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Provider Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The payment made by Medicare to the provider for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim. Additional payments may have been made to the provider — including beneficiary deductible and coinsurance amounts and/or other primary payer amounts.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Line Submitted Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount of submitted charges for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Part D Plan Noncovered Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This is the net amount paid by the Part D plan (i.e., for enhanced alternative benefits) including cost sharing fill-in and/or non-Part D drugs. This dollar amount is excluded from risk corridor calculations.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Amount paid by Part D plan for the PDE (drug is not covered by Part D)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Other True Out Of Pocket Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This is the amount of any payment made by other third-party payers that reduces the beneficiary’s liability for the PDE and counts towards Part D’s true out-of-pocket (TrOOP) requirement. Two examples are payments by qualified state pharmacy assistance programs or charities. This variable does not include amounts covered by the Part D low-income subsidy.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Patient Liability Reduction Other Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This is the amount of any payment by other third-party payers that reduces the beneficiary’s liability for the PDE but does not count towards Part D’s true out-of-pocket (TrOOP) requirement. Examples include payments by group health plans, worker's compensation, and governmental programs like the Veterans Administration and TRICARE.
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Reduction in patient liability due to payments by other payers (PLRO)'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Patient Pay Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the dollar amount that the beneficiary paid for the PDE without being reimbursed by a third party.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center 1st MSP Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount paid by the primary payer when the payer is primary to Medicare (Medicare is a secondary).
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Revenue Center 1st Medicare Secondary Payer (MSP) Paid Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center 2nd MSP Paid Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount paid by the secondary payer when two payers are primary to Medicare (Medicare is the tertiary payer).
additional: eob.item[N].adjudication[N].category.coding[N].display = 'Revenue Center 2nd Medicare Secondary Payer (MSP) Paid Amount'

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Payment Amount to Beneficiary
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount paid to the beneficiary for the services reported on the line item.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Blood Deductible Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the dollar amount the beneficiary is responsible for related to the deductible for blood products that appear on the revenue center record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Cash Deductible Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the beneficiary’s liability under the annual Part B deductible for the revenue center record. The Part B deductible applies to both institutional (e.g., HOP) and non-institutional (e.g., Carrier and DME) services.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Coinsurance/Wage Adjusted Coinsurance Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the beneficiary’s liability for coinsurance for the revenue center record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Non-Covered Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The charge amount related to a revenue center code for services that are not covered by Medicare.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: To obtain the Medicare payment amount for the services reported on the revenue center record, it is more accurate to use a different variable called the revenue center Medicare provider payment amount.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Provider Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount Medicare paid for the services reported on the revenue center record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Patient Responsibility Payment Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The amount paid by the beneficiary to the provider for the line-item service.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Rate Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: Charges relating to unit cost associated with the revenue center code.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Reduced Coinsurance Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: For all services subject to Outpatient prospective payment system (PPS or OPPS), the amount of coinsurance applicable to the line for a particular service (as indicated by the HCPCS code) for which the provider has elected to reduce the coinsurance amount.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Revenue Center Total Charge Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: The total charges (covered and non-covered) for all accommodations and services (related to the revenue code) for a billing period before reduction for the deductible and coinsurance amounts and before an adjustment for the cost of services provided.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Gap Discount Amount
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable indicates the amount of the discount provided by the drug’s manufacturer under the Medicare Coverage Gap Discount Program, as calculated by CMS based on data reported in the PDE.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.name: Total Prescription Cost
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.a.description: This variable is the total cost of the prescription drug event and is taken directly from the original PDE.

ExplanationOfBenefit.status.name: Final Action
ExplanationOfBenefit.status.description: Indicator to demonstrate if a claim is still 'active' or not ('cancelled'). Final action records are only indicative of the latest accepted record within a claim family that has been linked by the Medicare Advantage Organization (MAO) and may not be indicative of risk-adjustment eligibility.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.name: HCPCS Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.description: The Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) is a collection of codes that represent procedures, supplies, products, and services which may be provided to Medicare beneficiaries and to individuals enrolled in private health insurance programs.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.name: Line National Drug Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.description: On the DMERC claim, the National Drug Code identifying the oral anti-cancer drugs. This line-item field was added as a placeholder on the Carrier claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.name: Product Service National Drug Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.description: This field identifies the dispensed drug product using a National Drug Code (NDC).

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.name: Revenue Center National Drug Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.productOrServi.description: This field may contain one of three types of identifiers: the National Drug Code (NDC), the Universal Product Code (UPC), or the number assigned by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to an investigational device (IDE) after the manufacturer has approval to conduct a clinical trial.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].name: First Expense Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].description: Beginning date (1st expense) for this line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].name: Last Expense Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].description: The ending date (last expense) for the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].description: This is the date of service for the revenue center record.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.serviced[x].description: This field contains the date on which the prescription was filled.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.category.name: CMS Service Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.category.description: Code indicating the type of service, as defined in the CMS Medicare Carrier Manual, for this line item on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.name: HCT/HGB Test Result
ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.description: This is the laboratory value for the most recent hematocrit or hemoglobin reading on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.name: HCT/HGB Test Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.description: The type of test that was performed — hematocrit or hemoglobin.

ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.name: Organization NPI
ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.description: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the organization or group practice.

ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.name: Provider Number
ExplanationOfBenefit.contained.description: This variable is the provider identification number.  OR The billing number assigned to the supplier of the Part B service/DMEPOS by the National Supplier Clearinghouse, as reported on the line item for the DMERC claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.diagnosisSeque.name: Line Item Diagnosis Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.diagnosisSeque.description: The code indicating the diagnosis supporting this line-item procedure/service on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.diagnosisSeque.name: Line Item Diagnosis Code Version
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.diagnosisSeque.description: The code used to indicate if the diagnosis code is ICD-9/ICD-10.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.e.name: Payment Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.e.description: The code indicating that the amount shown in the payment field on the non-institutional line item represents either 80% or 100% of the allowed charges less any deductible, or 100% limitation of liability only.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.name: Service Count
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.description: The count of the total number of services processed for the line item on the non-institutional claim.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.name: Quantity Dispensed
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.description: This field indicates the number of units, grams, milliliters, or other quantity dispensed in the current drug event.

ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.name: Revenue Center National Drug Code Quantity
ExplanationOfBenefit.item.quantity.description: The quantity dispensed for the drug reflected on the revenue center line item.

ExplanationOfBenefit.type.name: Claim Type Code
ExplanationOfBenefit.type.description: The type of claim that was submitted. There are different claim types for each major category of health care provider.
additional: eob.type.coding[N].display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

ExplanationOfBenefit.payment.date.name: Payment Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.payment.date.description: The date on which the plan originally paid the pharmacy for the prescription drug.

ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.name: Plan Contract ID
ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.description: This variable is the unique Part D contract identifier for the beneficiary’s Part D plan of record for the year. CMS assigns an identifier to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.name: Plan Benefit Package ID
ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.description: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) identifier for the beneficiary’s Part D plan of record for the year. CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a Part D plan sponsor has with CMS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.name: EOB Insurance Coverage Reference
ExplanationOfBenefit.insurance.coverage.description: Reference to the insurance card level information contained in the Coverage resource. The coverage issuing insurer will use these details to locate the patient's actual coverage within the insurer's information system.

ExplanationOfBenefit.referral.description: The national provider identifier (NPI) number assigned to uniquely identify the referring physician.

ExplanationOfBenefit.referral.name: Referring Physician UPIN
ExplanationOfBenefit.referral.description: The unique physician identification number (UPIN) of the physician who referred the beneficiary or the physician who ordered the Part B services or durable medical equipment (DME).

ExplanationOfBenefit.provider.description: This variable is the identification number for the pharmacy or physicians' office that dispensed the drug, as reported by the Part D sponsor on the PDE record submitted to CMS.

ExplanationOfBenefit.id.name: EOB Resource ID

ExplanationOfBenefit.meta.name: EOB Resource Last Updated Date
ExplanationOfBenefit.meta.description: The date that this record was last updated within the database.

ExplanationOfBenefit.meta.name: EOB Resource Profile
ExplanationOfBenefit.meta.description: An assertion that the content within the FHIR resource response conforms to a FHIR resource profile defined by HL7 or other FHIR Accelerator Groups. The industry standard profile that is used as a template for this FHIR Resource.

ExplanationOfBenefit.total.category.name: Benefit Payment Status
ExplanationOfBenefit.total.category.description: Categorized monetary totals for the adjudication. To provide the requestor with financial totals by category for the adjudication. Indicates the in network or out of network payment status of the claim.
